# Level 4 — The Spike Hall
# New mechanics: spikes ON the ground forcing jumps over them (not just in pits),
# narrow platforms (3 tiles) with enemies forcing you to fight on tiny ground,
# first double-gap: 5 tiles → land → 5 tiles back-to-back with no rest
# Also introduces a low ceiling section (rows 8-11) that punishes full-height jumps
# Safe jump = 4 tiles wide. Ceiling gap = 3 tiles tall (player is 2 tiles, tight but ok)
# Width: 42 cols | Height: 22 rows
